Tests the Math.atan2 function with NaN as the first argument to ensure it returns NaN.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that verifies the behavior of the `Math.atan2` function when the first argument is `NaN`. It uses the `assert` function to check that the result of `Math.atan2(NaN, 1)` is `NaN`. This test ensures that the `Math.atan2` function correctly handles `NaN` inputs according to the IEEE 754 standard for floating-point arithmetic. The script provides narrow functionality, focusing specifically on this single mathematical operation and its expected output.
